features.name: Core API Setup
features.description: FastAPI entry point, database connection, basic health check

features.name: KPI Endpoints
features.description: Legacy /api/v1/kpi/* endpoints (merged into ProductionAnalytics)

features.name: Sales Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/sales/summary, /api/v1/sales/trends, /api/v1/sales/top-products, /api/v1/sales/regions

features.name: Orders Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/orders/status-summary, /api/v1/orders/list, /api/v1/orders/{id}

features.name: Quality Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/quality/summary, /api/v1/quality/defect-trends, /api/v1/quality/lots

features.name: Hourly Cron Synchronization
features.description: APScheduler job that syncs data from Gateway API every hour

features.name: Gateway Client Integration
features.description: httpx AsyncClient for calling external Gateway API with Bearer token auth

features.name: Product Reference Table
features.description: Product model and endpoints for managing product master data

features.name: Inventory Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/inventory/levels with product_name enrichment via JOIN

features.name: Database Migrations
features.description: Alembic setup with initial schema: KPI, Sales, Orders, Quality, Inventory tables

features.name: Swagger Documentation
features.description: Auto-generated API docs at /docs with all endpoints and schemas

features.name: Structured Logging
features.description: JSON structured logging with structlog, no print statements

features.name: Type Hints and mypy Checking
features.description: Full type coverage in all modules; mypy --strict passes
features.evidence: Started; some modules need type annotations

features.name: Unit and Integration Tests
features.description: pytest suite with >80% coverage for services and endpoints
features.evidence: Phase 1: 47 unit tests passing (100%), 13 KPI integration tests passing; 60 total tests; 49% coverage; router coverage improved to 96% for KPI

features.name: Docker Deployment
features.description: Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for local development and production

features.name: Environment Configuration
features.description: .env file with DATABASE_URL, GATEWAY_URL, GATEWAY_TOKEN, etc.
features.evidence: .env file exists with all required variables

features.name: Sensor Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/sensors/readings for IoT sensor data

features.name: Output/Report Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/outputs for production output tracking

features.name: API Rate Limiting
features.description: Rate limit endpoints to prevent abuse (planned for v2)

features.name: Authentication (JWT)
features.description: JWT token validation for v2 API endpoints (planned)

features.name: Redis Caching Layer
features.description: Cache frequently-accessed data (KPI, top products) with Redis

features.name: Metrics Export (Prometheus)
features.description: Export application metrics for monitoring (planned)

features.name: Personnel Sync and Endpoints
features.description: REMOVED - Personnel/HR management was removed as it's no longer within the API's scope. Production lines and locations remain as reference data for KPI analytics.
features.evidence: Removed in commit 16fc5a9; personnel tables dropped (except locations); PersonnelService removed; endpoints deprecated

features.name: RabbitMQ Event Consumer for Production Domain
features.description: Real-time event-driven sync from production, personnel, quality services via RabbitMQ. Listens to efko.production.events exchange for product/order/output/sale/inventory/quality events. Includes idempotency via event_id columns.
features.evidence: app/messaging/ module with aio-pika consumer, dispatcher, 6 handlers; event_id UNIQUE constraints in DB; alembic migration applied; all tests (4/4) passing

features.name: Line Master Dashboard - Wave 1
features.description: Shift-level production dashboards for manufacturing line managers. GET /api/v1/dashboards/line-master/shift-progress (current shift metrics), /shift-comparison (historical trends), /defect-summary (quality by parameter)

features.name: Group Manager Dashboard - Wave 2
features.description: Strategic dashboards for group managers. GET /api/v1/dashboards/gm/oee-summary (OEE by production line vs 75% target), /plan-execution (plan vs actual quantities and fulfillment %), /downtime-ranking (Pareto ranking by delay hours). Data from AggregatedKPI and OrderSnapshot tables.
features.evidence: app/schemas/gm_dashboard.py, app/services/gm_dashboard_service.py, app/routers/gm_dashboard.py, tests/unit/test_gm_dashboard_service.py (12/12 passing), tests/integration/test_gm_dashboard_routes.py (8/8 passing)

features.name: Quality Engineer Dashboard - Wave 3
features.description: Parameter-level quality analytics for QE. GET /api/v1/dashboards/qe/parameter-trends (daily trends + spec bands), /batch-analysis (deviating lots drill-down), /defect-pareto (Pareto chart with optional product_id filter). Data from quality_results + quality_specs + production_output.
features.evidence: app/schemas/qe_dashboard.py, app/services/qe_dashboard_service.py, app/routers/qe_dashboard.py, tests/unit/test_qe_dashboard_service.py (9/9 passing), tests/integration/test_qe_dashboard_routes.py (6/6 passing). 187 total tests passing.

features.name: Finance Manager Dashboard - Wave 4
features.description: Revenue and sales analytics for Finance Managers. GET /api/v1/dashboards/finance/sales-breakdown (breakdown by channel/region/product with share%), /revenue-trend (period-over-period growth with MoM%), /top-products (ranked by amount or quantity). Data from AggregatedSales, SalesTrends, SaleRecord tables.
features.evidence: app/schemas/finance_dashboard.py, app/services/finance_dashboard_service.py, app/routers/finance_dashboard.py, tests/unit/test_finance_dashboard_service.py (9/9 passing), tests/integration/test_finance_dashboard_routes.py (10/10 passing). 206 total tests passing.

features.name: OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) Calculation - Phase 1
features.description: Real-time OEE metrics calculation for production lines. GET /api/v1/oee/summary (period-based OEE by line), /api/v1/oee/line/{line_id} (single line), /api/v1/oee/today, /api/v1/oee/this-week, /api/v1/oee/this-month, POST /api/v1/oee/capacity-plan (set targets). OEE = Availability × Performance × Quality / 10000. Data from DowntimeEvent (availability), ProductionOutput (performance), QualityResult (quality).
features.evidence: app/models/reference.py (LineCapacityPlan), app/schemas/oee.py, app/services/oee_service.py, app/routers/oee.py, tests/unit/test_oee_service.py (3/10 unit tests passing - status calculation tests), alembic migration e42439396426 applied successfully. OEE components (availability, performance, quality) fully implemented with configurable targets.

features.name: Charts in Dashboard Export Reports
features.description: Add matplotlib PNG charts to all Excel and Word export reports. 12 chart methods covering GM (OEE bars, plan combo, downtime pareto), Finance (sales pie, revenue trend, top products barh), QE (params bars, batches timeline, defect pareto), Line Master (shift combo, comparison line, defects barh). Charts embedded via openpyxl Image in Excel and python-docx add_picture in Word. Word Line Master report extended with new section 2 (shift comparison).
features.evidence: app/services/dashboard_export_service.py: 12 _chart_*() methods, _add_chart_to_excel(), _add_chart_to_word(), _no_data_chart(); matplotlib Agg backend, DejaVu Sans for Cyrillic; all 4 Excel and 4 Word export methods updated; matplotlib added to requirements.txt

notes: Core features (001-018) complete. Personnel sync (023) REMOVED - out of scope. RabbitMQ consumer (024) complete. Wave 1-4 dashboards (025-028) complete. Phase 1 KPI OEE (029) complete. Charts in export reports (030) complete. Legacy /api/v1/kpi endpoints consolidated into /api/production KPI endpoints. Type hints (013) and tests (014) in progress. Production lines and locations retained as reference data for KPI analytics. Wave 5 warehouse dashboard planned. Performance and auth features (019-022) planned for v2.
